title: EV1 Compainion
description: Compainion mod for the EV1 SMP. It implements a Questbook that interacts with a folia server plugin
body:
# EV1 Companion Mod
EV1 Companion is an engaging companion mod crafted specifically for the EV1 SMP Server. This mod brings a interactive quest system, allowing to unlock recipes and dimensions.

While primarily designed for the EV1 SMP environment, it can also function on other Folia servers, provided that our  [module loader and the quest system module](https://github.com/NeverStopGaming/SMP) are installed.

Key Features:
- **Dynamic Quest System:** Tailor the adventure experience to suit your server's theme and community needs.
- **User-Friendly Interface:** The web interface for quest management simplifies the process for server administrators, making it easy to keep content fresh and engaging for players.
- **Community Driven:** Join our vibrant community at GitHub to access the module and contribute to the ever-growing repository of quests and features.
